title: carex sartwelliana
intro: Carex sartwelliana, also known as Sartwell's sedge, is a type of perennial sedge plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Carex sartwelliana include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and it is also used in folk remedies to make poultices and salves for topical application.
